title: aegilops speltoides f. ligustica
intro: Aegilops speltoides f. ligustica, also known as Ligustica spelt, is a wild grass species that belongs to the wheat tribe and is closely related to common wheat. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ligustica spelt include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system due to its high content of fiber, vitamins, and minerals. Herbal preparations of Aegilops speltoides f. ligustica can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
